title: ephemerantha bicostata
intro: Ephemerantha bicostata, also known as the lesser duck orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of ephemerantha bicostata include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Ephemerantha bicostata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
